themes: Long wait times across a broad mix of industries signal high demand for product dialogue — more than two-thirds of contacts have been waiting over 100 days, with several exceeding 300, suggesting the current feedback loop between customers and Product needs to be faster and more structured.

Managers dominate the backlog — nearly every contact holds a Manager-level role, pointing to a consistent gap in how SOCi surfaces actionable location-level reporting and workflow improvements for mid-tier operators who run day-to-day multi-location tasks.

Several accounts appear multiple times — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, and Anytime Fitness NA — indicating that unresolved product themes within these organizations are broad enough to affect multiple stakeholders and deserve prioritized, consolidated discovery conversations.
